question: Which statement best describes the site visits from 2018 to 2022 as shown in the bar chart?

options.A: We cannot tell if the last three years have the same or different visit counts because the bars are clipped.
options.B: Site visits were highest in 2019 and then decreased.
options.C: Site visits increased from 2018 to 2020 and then remained at the same level through 2022.
options.D: Site visits in the last three years were exactly the same.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top three bars are truncated and looks identical.
